headline: AUTODESK INC (NASDAQ:ADSK): A GARP Play Blending Solid Growth with a Reasonable Valuation
summary: Autodesk (ADSK) fits the GARP strategy with strong EPS and revenue growth, fair valuation, high profitability, and solid financial health.
